coreJobStatement: Provide leasable nonresidential building space to tenant organizations while maintaining regulatory-compliant safety infrastructure and preserving long-term asset value.

l6Systems.name: Property Acquisition
l6Systems.jobFamily: Identify and capitalize commercial real estate assets for the portfolio

l6Systems.name: Asset Preparation
l6Systems.jobFamily: Prepare building systems and access points for occupant use

l6Systems.name: Tenant Acquisition
l6Systems.jobFamily: Market vacancies, qualify tenants, and execute lease agreements

l6Systems.name: Building Operations
l6Systems.jobFamily: Operate and maintain physical building systems for continuous safe occupancy

l6Systems.name: Tenant Services
l6Systems.jobFamily: Service active tenants, manage obligations, handle renewals and exits
